Courses.title: Intro to Computers (JPN+EN)
Courses.description: The basic knowledge of core computer systems and essential skills for beginners.

Courses.description: Covers advanced topics in arithmetics, number theory, graph theory, and algorithms.

Courses.description: Introduction to vectors and matrices to build a foundation for ML and various other fields of mathematics.

Courses.description: Example-based machine learning with mathematical backgrounds and Python programs.
